title: Add status projection board
goal: Add a read-only JSON projection that combines registry state, runtime state, workspace state, external evidence, receipts and stale overlays into one status surface.

metadata.outcome: Added the read-only status projection board combining registry, runtime, workspace, receipt and GitHub evidence per task (src/bureau/status_projection.py, CLI status-projection).

verified_acceptance.projection-command: bureau status-projection --json emits per-task registry_state, effective_state, active_run with worker, workspace, github evidence and receipts
verified_acceptance.unknowns-visible: unknowns, stale_reasons, blocked_reasons and findings stay explicit; tests keep ci_unknown, blocked gh and stale overlays visible
verified_acceptance.machine-readable: schema_version 1, sorted stable JSON; stability test in tests/test_status_projection.py

acceptance.assertion: A command exposes per-task status with registry state, effective state, active run, worker, workspace, external evidence and receipt status.
Unknown, blocked and stale conditions remain visible instead of being collapsed into success or failure.
Projection output is stable JSON suitable for dashboards and later automation.
